Metabolite_Name: The standardized common name of the metabolite.
Target: The official, canonical HGNC gene symbol of the target protein (receptor, enzyme, or transporter).
Target_original: The unmapped, raw target symbol aggregated directly from the source databases before HGNC canonicalization.
Target_Uniprot: The canonical UniProt accession identifier dynamically resolved from the HGNC database for the canonical Target.
HMDB_ID: The unique identifier in the Human Metabolome Database (HMDB).
Sensor_Gene: The sensing gene in MEBOCOST, representing the protein interacting with the metabolite.
Protein_Name: Full descriptive name of the target protein.
Evidence: Supporting evidence or category for the interaction.
Sensor_Type: Functional type of the sensor gene (e.g. Receptor, Transporter, Enzyme).
database: The source database(s) where this entry originates.
Text_Evidence: Literature text snippets or PMIDs showing interaction evidence.
blood_concentration: Physiological concentration of the metabolite in human blood.
Secondary_HMDB_ID: Alternate HMDB IDs associated with the metabolite.
Kegg_ID: Unique identifier in the Kyoto Encyclopedia of Genes and Genomes (KEGG) database.
Synonyms: Alternative names and chemical synonyms for the metabolite.
Organ and components: Anatomical organs/components where the metabolite is localized.
Cell and elements: Cell types where the metabolite is localized.
Tissue and substructures: Tissue types and substructures where the metabolite is localized.
Biofluid and excreta: Human biofluids or excretions containing the metabolite.
Kingdom: Top-level taxonomic category for the chemical classification of the metabolite.
Super_Class: Broad chemical category of the metabolite (ClassyFire super_class level).
Sub_Class: Lower-level chemical subclass of the metabolite (ClassyFire sub_class level).
Class: Standard chemical class of the metabolite.
associated_gene: Metabolic genes associated with the synthesis or transport of the metabolite.
Software_Predicted: Indicator of whether the metabolite's localization or interaction was computationally predicted.
BioLocation_Summary: Text summary outlining the biological locations of the metabolite.
Receptor_Gene_Symbol: HGNC gene symbol of the receptor protein interacting with the metabolite.
Transporter: HGNC gene symbol of the transporter protein importing/exporting the metabolite.
Enzyme: HGNC gene symbol of the enzyme interacting with or processing the metabolite.
Task: High-level signaling task or metabolic complex (e.g. in scCellFie or CellPhoneDBv5).
transmembrane: Indicates if the target protein is a transmembrane protein.
peripheral: Indicates if the target protein is a peripheral membrane protein.
secreted: Indicates if the target protein is secreted into the extracellular space.
secreted_desc: Descriptive text detailing the secretion properties of the target protein.
secreted_highlight: Highlighted annotation specifying secreted status in MEBOCOST.
integrin: Indicates if the target protein belongs to the integrin family.
other: Indicates if the target protein has other functional classifications in MEBOCOST.
other_desc: Functional description of other classifications in MEBOCOST.
pdb_structure: Protein Data Bank (PDB) structural identifier for the metabolite/target.
comments_complex: Descriptive comments regarding the protein complex structure.
curator: Database curator who verified or uploaded the entry.
CellphoneDB_ver: CellPhoneDBv5 database version supporting this interaction.
Uniprot: UniProt accession identifier for the target protein.
Protein_Uniprot: UniProt accession identifier for metabolic enzyme/transporter target proteins (historically UNIPROT_ID).
uniprot_1: UniProt accession identifier for the first subunit/protein in a complex.
uniprot_2: UniProt accession identifier for the second subunit/protein in a complex.
uniprot_3: UniProt accession identifier for the third subunit/protein in a complex.
uniprot_4: UniProt accession identifier for the fourth subunit/protein in a complex.
Class_source: Source database for the chemical classification.
Cell_Compartment: Subcellular cellular compartment where the reaction occurs.
Synthetic_genes: Metabolic genes responsible for synthesizing the metabolite.
Synthetic_genes_lv2: Lower-confidence or level-2 metabolic genes responsible for synthesis.
Metaligand_transporter_genes_out: Genes responsible for exporting or transporting the metabolite (historically Transporter_genes).
Metaligand_transporter_genes_in: Genes responsible for importing the metabolite into cells (historically Transporter_genes_in).
precursor_transport: Notes regarding transport of precursor molecules.
PubChem CID/SID: PubChem chemical compound or substance identifier.
Molecular Formula: Standard chemical molecular formula of the metabolite.
CHEMICAL_FORMULA: Standard chemical molecular formula of the metabolite.
Canonical SMILES: Standard Simplified Molecular-Input Line-Entry System (SMILES) representation.
SMILES: Standard Simplified Molecular-Input Line-Entry System (SMILES) representation.
Receptor_Gene_ID: Entrez gene identifier for the receptor.
Receptor_Uniprot: UniProt accession identifier for the receptor protein.
PMID: PubMed identifier(s) for literature citations supporting the interaction.
Other.DB: References or IDs in other chemical/biological databases.
HMDB_Protein_ID: Identifier in other database consolidations (historically HAMDBP_ID).
Enzyme_Full_Name: IUPAC name or common name of the enzyme (historically ENZYME_NAME).
Human_geneID: Entrez Gene ID for the human target.
REACTIONS: Biochemical reactions associated with the pair.
enzyme product/substrate: Describes if the metabolite is a substrate or product of the target enzyme.
Interaction: Direct clinical interaction type (e.g., regulation, activation, inhibition).
Cell type: Clinical immune or somatic cell type mediating the interaction (T-cells, macrophages, etc.).
Experimental subject: Experimental model or cell line used to verify the interaction.
Effect: Functional effect of the metabolite on cells (e.g., pro-tumorigenic).
Effect_detail: Detail regarding the functional effect on cells.
scCellFie_value: Reaction pathway activity score or value.
System: Top-level metabolic system category in scCellFie (e.g., Carbohydrate metabolism).
Subsystem: Metabolic subsystem pathway in scCellFie (e.g., Glycolysis).
databases_count: Number of integrated databases supporting this pair/metabolite.
INCHIKEY: Standard IUPAC International Chemical Identifier key.
AVERAGE_MASS: Average molecular mass of the metabolite.
Pair_Confidence_Tier: Confidence tier of the specific metabolite-target interaction pair.
Metabolite_Confidence_Tier: Confidence tier of the metabolite itself.
Confidence_Tier: Confidence tier category (Tier 1: high, Tier 2: medium, Tier 3: low) based on database overlap.
receptor: Indicates if the target protein acts as a receptor in CellPhoneDBv5 or other source databases.
